title: Project Task-Management System
shortDescription: A production-ready REST API built with FastAPI and PostgreSQL, featuring OAuth2 authentication, automated testing, and CI/CD integration for high-concurrency environments.
overview: This production-grade REST API platform was architected to serve as a robust backbone for modern web applications. Built using the high-performance FastAPI framework, it implements a multi-layered security architecture with asynchronous database handling for maximum throughput. The system features a custom-built JWT authentication flow with refresh token rotation, ensuring secure and persistent user sessions.

steps.title: Database Design
steps.description: Normalization and schema modeling for high-performance relations using Alembic for migrations.

steps.title: Authentication Flow
steps.description: Implementing OAuth2 with Password Flow, hashing credentials with BCrypt, and issuing signed JWTs.

steps.title: API Development
steps.description: Developing modular endpoints following RESTful principles with Pydantic for strict data validation.

steps.title: Testing & Deployment
steps.description: Unit testing with Pytest and containerization via Docker for seamless CI/CD pipeline integration.

challenges.title: Managing JWT Expiry
challenges.description: Handling seamless user sessions without compromising security. Implemented a Dual-Token system with short-lived Access Tokens and long-lived Refresh Tokens stored in HTTP-only cookies.

challenges.title: Query Performance
challenges.description: As the dataset grew, certain relational queries slowed down. Used EXPLAIN ANALYZE to identify bottlenecks and applied composite indices on frequently queried foreign keys.

title: ML Model Deployment Pipeline
shortDescription: End-to-end ML pipeline encompassing data preprocessing, automated training, and serving models via highly optimized endpoints.
overview: A complete machine learning pipeline that handles everything from raw data ingestion to model serving. The pipeline includes automated preprocessing, feature engineering, model training with cross-validation, and deployment as a REST API endpoint using FastAPI.

steps.title: Data Preprocessing
steps.description: Built automated data cleaning and feature engineering pipeline using Pandas and NumPy.

steps.title: Model Training
steps.description: Trained and evaluated multiple models using Scikit-learn with cross-validation and hyperparameter tuning.

steps.title: API Deployment
steps.description: Wrapped the trained model in a FastAPI endpoint with proper input validation and error handling.

steps.title: Monitoring
steps.description: Added logging and monitoring for model predictions and endpoint performance tracking.

challenges.title: Data Quality Issues
challenges.description: Raw data had missing values and outliers. Built a robust preprocessing pipeline that handles edge cases automatically.

challenges.title: Model Inference Speed
challenges.description: Initial inference was slow. Optimized by caching the loaded model in memory and using async endpoints.

title: Real Time Chat Application
shortDescription: Full stack chat app featuring a React frontend and Python backend, utilizing WebSockets for instantaneous messaging and MongoDB for history.
overview: A real-time chat application built with React on the frontend and a Python WebSocket server on the backend. Features include instant message delivery, persistent chat history stored in MongoDB, and a clean dark themed UI.

steps.title: WebSocket Server
steps.description: Built Python WebSocket server handling multiple concurrent connections and message broadcasting.

steps.title: MongoDB Integration
steps.description: Set up MongoDB for persistent chat history with efficient querying for recent messages.

steps.title: React Frontend
steps.description: Built responsive React UI with real-time message updates and clean dark theme.

steps.title: Connection Management
steps.description: Implemented reconnection logic and connection state management for reliability.

challenges.title: WebSocket Scaling
challenges.description: Managing multiple concurrent connections efficiently. Implemented connection pooling and proper cleanup on disconnect.

challenges.title: Message Ordering
challenges.description: Ensuring messages arrive in correct order. Added timestamp based sorting and client side ordering.

title: Data Analysis Dashboard
shortDescription: Interactive data analysis tool that visualizes complex backend metrics, enabling real-time monitoring of system health and performance.
overview: An interactive data analysis dashboard that processes and visualizes complex datasets. Built with Python and Pandas for data processing, PostgreSQL for storage, and a clean frontend for visualization.

steps.title: Data Pipeline
steps.description: Built ETL pipeline to ingest, clean and transform raw data using Pandas and NumPy.

steps.title: Database Schema
steps.description: Designed PostgreSQL schema optimized for analytical queries with proper indexing.

steps.title: Analysis Engine
steps.description: Implemented statistical analysis functions for deriving insights from processed data.

steps.title: Visualization Layer
steps.description: Built interactive charts and metrics display for clear data presentation.

challenges.title: Large Dataset Performance
challenges.description: Processing large datasets was slow. Implemented chunked processing and database level aggregations.

challenges.title: Query Optimization
challenges.description: Complex analytical queries were slow. Added materialized views and proper composite indexes.
